menu.export.label: $(export) Export Script (VB.NET)
menu.export.detail: Translates and prepares the current code to paste into vMix
menu.import.label: $(import) Import Script from project
menu.import.detail: Select a script from the linked .vmix project and apply typing
menu.openProject.label: $(folder-opened) Open project
menu.settings.label: $(settings-gear) Settings
menu.keymap.label: $(keyboard) Install VS 2022 keymap
menu.runScript.label: $(play) Run script in vMix
menu.refreshFromVmix.label: $(refresh) Refresh Inputs from vMix
menu.refreshFromVmix.detail: Reads current state from running vMix via HTTP API
menu.verifyRoundTrip.label: $(check) Verify script round-trip
menu.verifyRoundTrip.detail: Exports and reimports to detect data loss
menu.exportStandalone.label: $(file-code) Export as .vb file
menu.exportStandalone.detail: Saves exported code to a separate file
menu.newFromTemplate.label: $(new-file) New script from template
menu.newFromTemplate.detail: Create a new script using a common template
dialog.openProject.label: Link to Scripting Assistant
keymap.error: There was an error trying to install the keymap.
export.success: Script exported and ready for vMix.
export.unknownFunctions: Warning: {0} function(s) not found in vMix.json: {1}. Exported with generic format.
export.noScriptName: Cannot export: the first line must be a comment with the script name (e.g., 'My Script).
export.askUpdateProject: Update the script '{0}' in the linked project?
export.backupError: Could not create project backup. Operation cancelled for safety.
import.noProject: No project linked. Use 'Open project' first to link a .vmix file.
import.noScripts: No scripts found in the linked project.
diag.typeError: Type Error: The '{0}' parameter requires an element from 'InputsList'.
diag.subNotAllowed: vMix does not allow "Sub" declarations. The script already runs inside an implicit Sub.
diag.functionNotAllowed: vMix does not allow "Function" declarations. Use variables and linear logic instead.
diag.typeMismatch: Type mismatch: '{0}' is {1} but compared/assigned with {2}.
diag.objectsListRequired: The '{0}' parameter requires an element from 'ObjectsList'.
diag.firstLineRequired: The first line must be a comment with the script name (e.g., 'My Script). Required for export.
diag.dataSourceRequired: The first parameter must be a DataSource type (e.g., DataSource.GoogleSheets).
diag.dataSourceInvalidMember: '{0}' is not a valid DataSource type. Valid types: Excel_CSV, GoogleSheets, RSS, Text, XML, JSON, ZoomChat.
diag.reservedWord: '{0}' is a VB.NET reserved word and cannot be used as a variable name.
diag.waitMissing: Possible consecutive calls on the same input '{0}' without a Wait. Consider adding API.Function("Wait", Value:="...") between calls.
diag.directApiFunction: A typed version is available: API.{0}.{1}(...)
diag.infiniteLoop: Loop has no visible exit condition (no Until/While and no Exit Do).
vmixApi.notRunning: vMix is not responding at {0}. Make sure it's running with HTTP API enabled.
roundTrip.success: Round-trip OK: the script is stable across export/import.
roundTrip.diff: Round-trip detected differences. See the comparison document.
prop.text: Gets or sets the text of an object.
prop.image: Gets or sets the image of an object.
prop.inputFind: Finds an Input by name and returns a reference.
prop.shortcutValue: Gets the value of a Shortcut.
